subject: LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-TRIGGER-FIX PASS — sync chain self-healing verified end-to-end

summary.what: Added workflow_run trigger to sync_runtime_to_public.yml so it auto-fires when Auto PROJECT_STATUS Regenerate or AIER Code Heartbeat finish.
summary.why: Closes the critical chained-workflow gap from LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-AUDIT-V1 (PR #14): default GITHUB_TOKEN cannot trigger downstream workflows on push.
summary.outcome: Sync chain now self-healing. End-to-end test verified. No PAT introduced.

critical_correction.issue: Task spec assumed upstream workflow name was 'Auto Project Status' but actual name field is 'Auto PROJECT_STATUS Regenerate'.
critical_correction.fix: Used actual repo name verbatim. workflow_run is case-sensitive name-match; wrong name would silently never fire.

e2e_test_evidence.step_1_baseline: Last sync run before test = 25106428334 (workflow_dispatch hot-fix from earlier today)
e2e_test_evidence.step_2_trigger_upstream: gh workflow run auto_project_status.yml --ref main → run 25113517473
e2e_test_evidence.step_4_downstream_auto_fired: Sync run 25113539568, event=workflow_run, status=completed, conclusion=success — FIRST EVER workflow_run-triggered sync run in repo history
e2e_test_evidence.step_6_sync_info_proof: SYNC_INFO.md records 'Triggered by: workflow_run' (was always 'push' before)
e2e_test_evidence.lag_observed: ~20 seconds from upstream completion to downstream sync run start
e2e_test_evidence.bonus_observation: Lane_03's parallel SYNC_EXPANSION_V1 added new whitelist entries (ECOSYSTEM_HEALTH_STATE.md/json + LATEST_VERIFIED_COMMITS.json + NEXT_SAFE_ACTION.md). All delivered to Live mirror via the new auto chain on first run.

boundary_compliance: 9/9 PASS — single workflow file scope · 0 Uniton_OS · 0 Uniton_Shared_Live direct mods · 0 docs/canon/scripts · 0 PAT · [vercel skip] · LANE01- DOT format · NTS clicks 0

implications_for_next_steps.unblocks: LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-FOUNDATION (Option B from audit) — now CLA can extend the whitelist + add new namespaces (tasks/, ledger/, status/, aier-status/) without re-engineering the trigger. The trigger problem is solved.
implications_for_next_steps.implicit_verification: AC5 of LANE01-INH-CODE-02b heartbeat (2 scheduled cron runs verification window) — heartbeat workflow now also triggers sync via this fix. SYNC_INFO.md will record heartbeat workflow_run completions automatically every ~10 min, providing implicit verification.
implications_for_next_steps.future_protection_optional: Add unit-test workflow that asserts workflow_run.workflows[] still match upstream `name:` fields — protects against silent-no-fire if either watched workflow ever renames itself.

next_recommended_tasks: (NTS decision still open) LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-FOUNDATION (Option B from audit) — implement tasks/, ledger/, status/, aier-status/ namespaces. Trigger fix is done; whitelist expansion + new derive scripts remain.
(optional follow-up) LANE01-WORKFLOW-NAME-INTEGRITY-CHECK — unit-test workflow that fails if workflow_run.workflows[] don't match upstream `name:` fields verbatim.
open_followups_orthogonal: AC5 of LANE01-INH-CODE-02b heartbeat — now satisfied implicitly via workflow_run chain (heartbeat completion → sync run logged)
acceptance_criteria_for_CLA_review: Verify SYNC_INFO.md on Uniton_Shared_Live shows 'Triggered by: workflow_run' on most recent sync
Confirm 3 mandatory deliverables LANE01- DOT format prefix correct
Decide on LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-FOUNDATION dispatch timing (Option B from audit)
